case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., A CORPORATION VS DUARTE FELIX R.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,330.91 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE FELIX R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE FELIX R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUARTE FELIX R. $1,330.91 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,330.91, DEFT TO PAY $70 ON 2/12/93, $70 ON 2/23/93 AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
